name: @tuler/luke-decoder
description: Typed toolkit for writing Cartesi Node Explorer payload decoders

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --target=browser --format=esm --outdir dist && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit false --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --rootDir src --outDir dist && bun ../../infra/prepare-dist.ts
